'''Mika''', also known as '''Jellyfish Cove''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|penal]] [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] covered with [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and barren [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] littered with [[Mikan|humanoid statues]] which came to life at sunset.

{{Ast-stub}}
